task.prompt: Author a new Auth Flow flowchart as Mermaid source directly, parse it, verify it, then return the source. Do not use mutate because there is no existing diagram to preserve.

prompts.system: pi subagent-backed release-model pass: delegate agent, fresh context. Pi hidden system prompt is not exposed; prompts.user records the exact parent-visible task sent to the subagent.
prompts.user:
Return ONLY executable synchronous JavaScript body for Agentic Mermaid Code Mode. No markdown/prose.

The deterministic oracle requires the final value to be an object with a `source` property containing the authored Mermaid source.

Runtime contract: top-level return allowed; global mermaid.*; no async. This is a new diagram, so author Mermaid source directly, parse it with `mermaid.parseMermaid`, verify with `mermaid.verifyMermaid`, inspect verify.ok or warnings, and return `{ source }`. Do not mutate.

Task ID: author_auth_flow_source
Task: Author a new Auth Flow flowchart with nodes User, Login Page, Valid Credentials?, MFA Enabled?, Enter MFA Code, Code Valid?, Create Session, Dashboard and edges A->B, B->C, C->B, C->D, D->E, E->F, F->E, D->G, F->G, G->H.

Return JS only. Final line should return `{ source }`.
